data.title: Lending and Yield Protocols Experience Significant TVL Declines
data.description:
Several lending and yield protocols are experiencing notable double-digit percentage decreases in their total value locked (TVL). According to CoinDesk, despite these substantial declines in TVL, the prices of tokens associated with these protocols have only seen limited reductions. This trend highlights a divergence between the value locked in these platforms and the market valuation of their tokens.

The decline in TVL across these protocols suggests a shift in user behavior or confidence, potentially driven by broader market conditions or specific issues within the protocols themselves. However, the relatively stable token prices indicate that investors may still hold a degree of confidence in the long-term viability of these platforms. This situation underscores the complex dynamics at play in the cryptocurrency market, where various factors can influence different aspects of a protocol's ecosystem. As the market continues to evolve, stakeholders will be closely monitoring these trends to assess their potential impact on the broader crypto landscape.

data.title: Asset Tokenization Platform BRIX Delays Launch to April 23
data.description:
Asset tokenization platform BRIX has announced a delay in its launch until April 23. According to Foresight News, the decision was made due to recent security incidents in the DeFi sector, with the aim of avoiding a release during a period of instability in the ecosystem. The platform plans to verify and check settings with all integrated partners before proceeding.

Previously, BRIX secured $5.5 million in funding on April 15, with participation from FRWRD, the venture capital arm of Yapi Kredi, among others.

data.title: Crypto Investor Huang Licheng Increases BTC and ETH Leveraged Positions
data.description: On April 20, Huang Licheng, known as 'Machi Big Brother,' has reportedly increased his leveraged positions in Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) within the past hour. According to BlockBeats, HyperInsight monitoring indicates that Huang Licheng is currently holding long positions with 40x leverage on 420 BTC at an average entry price of $75,680.9, and 25x leverage on 10,400 ETH at an average entry price of $2,291.12. The total unrealized loss from these positions amounts to $671,000.

data.title: DeFi TVL Drops by $13.21 Billion Following KelpDAO Bridge Exploit
data.description:
A significant exploit involving the KelpDAO bridge has resulted in a $13.21 billion decrease in the total value locked (TVL) in decentralized finance (DeFi) over the past 48 hours. According to NS3.AI, data from DefiLlama indicates that Aave experienced a loss of $8.45 billion in deposits during this period. The overall DeFi TVL declined from $99.497 billion to $86.286 billion.

The exploit allowed attackers to use stolen rsETH as collateral to borrow on various lending platforms. This incident has led to market freezes and prompted users to withdraw their funds.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Broadcom Five Continues Collaboration with Huawei Ascend and Baidu Kunlun Chip
data.description: Broadcom Five has established deep collaborations with major domestic GPU manufacturers, including Huawei Ascend and Baidu Kunlun Chip. According to Jin10, these partnerships aim to comprehensively cover application scenarios such as AIGC and computer vision. The collaborations are part of a broader strategy to enhance technological capabilities and expand the application of artificial intelligence in various sectors.

data.title: Taiwan Considers Allowing Dividend Payouts in US Dollars
data.description: Taiwan is considering a proposal to allow listed companies to distribute dividends in US dollars, marking a shift from the current requirement of payouts in the local currency. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the matter. This potential change aims to provide more flexibility for companies and align with international practices. The move could also attract more foreign investors by simplifying the dividend process. However, the proposal is still under discussion, and no final decision has been made. The change, if implemented, would represent a significant adjustment in Taiwan's financial regulations, reflecting the island's efforts to enhance its global financial integration.

data.title: U.S. Marines Seize Iranian-Flagged Vessel After Standoff in Arabian Sea
data.description: U.S. Marines successfully boarded and seized the Iranian-flagged M/V Touska following a six-hour standoff on April 20. According to NS3.AI, the operation involved Marines departing from the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli via helicopter, crossing the Arabian Sea, and boarding the vessel using fast-roping techniques. Prior to the boarding, the guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance disabled the ship's propulsion system, facilitating the Marines' operation.

data.title: Crypto Analyst Ansem: Ethereum Faces Challenges in 2026 Compared to 2023
data.description: Crypto analyst Ansem has expressed concerns about Ethereum's position in 2026, suggesting it is less favorable than in 2023. According to NS3.AI, Ansem believes the Ethereum thesis has been weakening over the years. He attributes this to Solana's growing retail presence, Hyperliquid's dominance in perpetual futures, limited progress in rollup adoption, and the recent Aave rsETH exploit. Despite Ansem's perspective, other community members have contested his assessment, indicating differing opinions on Ethereum's future trajectory.

data.title: LayerZero: The KelpDAO attack was limited to its rsETH configuration and the protocol itself has no vulnerabilities.
data.description: LayerZero Labs announced on the X platform that KelpDAO suffered an attack on April 18th, resulting in losses of approximately $290 million. The initial assessment identifies the attacker as Lazarus Group. The attack was achieved by poisoning the downstream RPC infrastructure upon which KelpDAO's decentralized validator network (DVN) relies. The attackers controlled some RPC nodes and, in conjunction with a DDoS attack, induced the system to switch to malicious nodes, thereby forging cross-chain transactions. Currently, all affected RPC nodes have been taken offline and replaced, and DVN has resumed operation. LayerZero emphasizes that this incident was limited to KelpDAO's rsETH application configuration and did not affect other assets or applications. KelpDAO's use of a single DVN architecture without multi-DVN redundancy mechanisms prevented it from identifying forged messages. The LayerZero protocol itself did not have any vulnerabilities, and applications with multi-DVN configurations were unaffected. LayerZero will drive the migration of all single DVN configuration projects to a multi-DVN architecture and has suspended signing and verification services for 1/1 configuration applications, while assisting law enforcement agencies in tracking stolen funds.

data.title: Japan's Households Expect Inflation to Reach 11.4% in One Year, BOJ Survey Finds
data.description: A recent survey conducted by the Bank of Japan reveals that Japanese households anticipate an average inflation rate of 11.4% over the next year. According to Jin10, the median expectation for inflation stands at 10.0%. This survey highlights the growing concerns among Japanese households regarding rising prices and their potential impact on the economy. The findings come amid ongoing discussions about inflationary pressures and economic policies in Japan.

data.title: Japan's February Tertiary Industry Activity Index Declines Slightly
data.description: Japan's February tertiary industry activity index showed a monthly decrease of 0.4%, according to Jin10. This decline was slightly better than the anticipated drop of 0.5%. The previous month's index had recorded a significant increase of 1.70%, highlighting a notable shift in economic activity.

data.title: US military releases video of boarding Iranian cargo ship
data.description: U.S. Central Command: U.S. Marines, transported by helicopter from the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7), crossed the Arabian Sea, boarded and seized the M/V Touska. The Marines rappelled onto the Iranian-flagged vessel on April 20 after the guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance disabled the Touska's propulsion system after the merchant ship failed to heed repeated warnings from the U.S. military for six hours. (Jin Shi)

data.title: AI Reshapes DeFi, Challenges Traditional SaaS and Token Economics
data.description: AI is transforming the decentralized finance (DeFi) landscape by introducing tokens and agents that enhance capital efficiency and organizational computability. According to PANews, this development poses a challenge to traditional Software as a Service (SaaS) models and token economics, leading financial engineering into uncharted territories.

data.title: Japan's Fukoku Life Insurance Plans to Reduce Japanese Bond Purchases
data.description: Fukoku Life Insurance Company in Japan plans to decrease its purchases of Japanese government bonds in the current fiscal year, according to reports. The company believes there is limited room for growth in yields on super-long-term bonds. Fukoku Life intends to increase its holdings of Japanese bonds by 110 billion yen (approximately $6.91 billion), which is a reduction compared to the previous fiscal year's projected increase of around 480 billion yen. According to Jin10, Yusuke Onodera, the company's executive officer of the investment planning department, stated, "Last fiscal year, domestic bond yields rose more than expected, prompting us to reduce foreign bond investments to increase domestic investments. However, this year, we have observed that yields on super-long-term bonds have remained generally stable, leading to a slower pace of bond replacement."

data.title: B2Gold Expects Gold Production to Remain Low
data.description: Canadian mining company B2Gold has announced that it anticipates its gold production will remain at a lower level in the near future. According to Jin10, the company has not specified the exact reasons for this expected decrease in production, but it is likely influenced by various operational and market factors. B2Gold's statement comes amid fluctuating gold prices and changing market dynamics, which could impact the company's output and financial performance. The company continues to monitor the situation closely and is evaluating strategies to address these challenges.

data.title: Web3 Hacks Predominantly Driven by Social Engineering in Q1, Reports Tiger Research
data.description: Social engineering was responsible for 74.7% of Web3 hacks in the first quarter of this year, according to NS3.AI. Tiger Research highlighted that the persistent thefts and low recovery rates, which remained below 10%, are eroding trust in the industry. The report underscores the need for enhanced security measures to address these vulnerabilities and restore confidence among stakeholders.

data.title: Binance Futures Updates Leverage and Margin Tiers for USDⓈ-M Perpetual Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the leverage and margin tiers for QQQUSDT, SPYUSDT, EWYUSDT, and EWJUSDT USDⓈ-M Perpetual Contracts have been updated as of 2026-04-21 07:30 (UTC). These changes will impact existing positions opened before the update, and users are advised to adjust their positions accordingly to avoid potential expiration of futures running grids.

The updated leverage and margin tiers are as follows: For positions with a notional value of 0 to 5,000 USDT, the leverage has been adjusted from 16-20x to 6-10x, with a maintenance margin rate of 5.00%. For positions between 5,000 and 10,000 USDT, the leverage is now 5x, with a maintenance margin rate of 10.00%. Positions ranging from 10,000 to 25,000 USDT will also have a leverage of 5x, maintaining the same margin rate. For larger positions, from 25,000 to 50,000 USDT, the leverage remains at 5x, with a 10.00% margin rate. Positions between 50,000 and 100,000 USDT will have a leverage of 4x, with a 12.50% margin rate. For positions from 100,000 to 500,000 USDT, the leverage is set at 3x, with a 16.67% margin rate. Finally, positions from 500,000 to 8,000,000 USDT will have a leverage of 2x, with a 25.00% margin rate, and positions from 8,000,000 to 15,000,000 USDT will maintain a leverage of 1x, with a 50.00% margin rate.

These updates are part of Binance's ongoing efforts to optimize trading conditions for its users. Traders are encouraged to review the new parameters and adjust their strategies accordingly to align with the updated leverage and margin requirements.

data.title: Shipping Disruptions in Hormuz Strait Highlight Ongoing Uncertainty
data.description:
Shipping through the Hormuz Strait remains intermittent, underscoring the uncertainty surrounding this crucial global oil and gas passage. According to BlockBeats, analysts have noted that even if hostilities cease, it could take months or even years for oil flow through this narrow waterway to return to pre-conflict levels.

The pace of recovery is expected to depend not only on diplomatic progress between Washington and Tehran but also on logistical conditions, the availability of tanker insurance, freight rates, and shipowners' willingness to risk passage. Analysts predict that a full rebalancing of the global tanker fleet and the resumption of Gulf loading operations to pre-war rhythms will be uneven, potentially taking at least eight to twelve weeks even under favorable conditions.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Saw Net Inflows of $276 Million Last Week, Fidelity's FETH Leads with $126 Million
data.description: According to Odaily citing data from SoSoValue, Ethereum spot ETFs recorded net inflows of $276 million during the last trading week (April 13 to April 17, Eastern Time).The Ethereum spot ETF with the highest net inflows last week was Fidelity's ETF FETH, with weekly net inflows of $126 million. FETH's cumulative historical net inflows now stand at $2.36 billion. Following closely was BlackRock's ETF ETHA, with weekly net inflows of $99.2271 million. ETHA's cumulative historical net inflows have reached $11.83 billion.The Ethereum spot ETF with the highest net outflows last week was Grayscale's Ethereum Trust ETHE, with weekly net outflows of $16.679 million. ETHE's cumulative historical net outflows now total $5.20 billion.As of the time of writing, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $14.26 billion. The ETF net asset ratio (the proportion of ETF market value relative to Ethereum's total market cap) has reached 4.87%, with cumulative historical net inflows amounting to $11.94 billion.

data.title: Malaysia Anticipates Inflation Rise Due to Iran Conflict Impact
data.description: Malaysia is preparing for a delayed increase in inflation as the effects of the Iran conflict are expected to influence consumer prices later this year, according to Economy Minister Akmal Nasrullah Mohd Nasir. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential economic repercussions of the ongoing geopolitical tensions. The minister noted that the conflict's impact on global supply chains and energy prices could lead to higher costs for Malaysian consumers. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation to mitigate any adverse effects on the economy.
